prompt: Add chat @mentions with auto-invite to the Project Board app (board/ frontend + nsty/ Frappe backend). Composer: typing @ opens a live-filtered picker over the board's users with keyboard navigation; users who are NOT board members are flagged 'not a member · will be invited'. Mentions insert as plain-text '@Full Name' tokens; track a name-to-email map in the composer state and resolve tokens on send. Backend: post_project_chat gains a mentions param — validate it, store it in a hidden Comment custom field custom_board_mentions, and silently append mentioned NON-members to the project's Users table (welcome_email_sent=1; permission bypass is intentional — any chat participant may pull colleagues in). The mention-token parsing/resolution logic lives in board/src/lib/mentions.ts with unit tests (vitest). Commit when the frontend tests pass. Do not deploy.
check_cmd: cd board && bunx vitest run src/lib/mentions.test.ts
